capabilities: Combine AI prompting and software architecture methodologies to establish a reliable seed prompt for consistent AI outputs.

procedure.action: Run a diff tool on AI prompt templates and architecture workflows to identify overlapping steps using domain-appropriate tooling; validate output against the defined schema; assert error_count = 0; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Invoke a text similarity algorithm to detect candidate steps for merging across both domains using domain-appropriate tooling; validate output against the defined schema; assert error_count = 0; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail by invoking the target API with the specified parameters; assert response_status < 400 and response_time_ms < 5000; log request_id and response_code.

Execute a classification model to categorize results into 'merge', 'modify', or 'discard' using domain-appropriate tooling; validate output against the defined schema; assert error_count = 0; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail by executing the transformation function on each input record; assert output_schema_valid = true and error_count < 1; log transformation_duration_ms.

Execute a test suite on merged artifacts to validate output consistency against baseline metrics using domain-appropriate tooling; validate output against the defined schema; assert error_count = 0; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Log results using structured logging to track performance and identify areas for improvement using domain-appropriate tooling; validate output against the defined schema; assert error_count = 0; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Integrate AI prompting techniques with software architecture principles to create a consistent seed prompt, ensuring reliable AI outputs by merging and validating workflows.
title: Establishing Seed Prompt for Consistent AI Output

failureConditions: Inconsistent AI outputs due to unaligned workflows.
Merged artifacts fail validation, leading to unreliable results.
Overlapping steps are incorrectly classified, causing inefficiencies.
successConditions: Merged workflow passes all test cases with >95% success rate.
AI outputs remain consistent across 1000 iterations; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Structured logs show no critical errors during execution; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
